summary: Add Mega Vault Viewer vault mark logo
description: Add a compact rounded-square vault logo matching the user's reference image to the app chrome and packaged desktop icon assets.
acceptance: Sidebar brand shows a small rounded square cyan vault mark next to MVV; packaged icon assets use the same mark; build/check/browser smoke pass.
verification: npm --workspace apps/desktop run build; npm run check; browser DOM/vision smoke

evidence.summary: Added sidebar vault mark next to MVV; fixed status-chip selector so the mark shows its gray rounded tile and cyan/dark inner vault; regenerated packaged icon.png 1024x1024 and multi-size icon.ico; npm run check passed; browser proof markExists=true markSize=23x23 innerBorder=rgb(24,201,230).
